footer.tagline: Belgian electrical engineering and technical services company. Practical expertise for industrial, energy, and infrastructure clients across Belgium and Europe.
footer.copyright: Bodatec. All rights reserved. Lokeren, Belgium.
footer.linkedinLabel: Bodatec on LinkedIn (opens in new tab)

electrical-engineering.title: Electrical Engineering Support
electrical-engineering.shortDescription: Practical engineering support for electrical system design, documentation, and technical studies.
electrical-engineering.description: Bodatec provides hands-on electrical engineering support for industrial and energy projects. From concept through detailed design to as-built documentation, our engineers integrate directly into project teams or operate independently to deliver reliable technical work.
scope: Cable sizing, routing, and schedule preparation
Load flow, short-circuit, and arc flash calculations
FAT / SAT preparation and witnessing support
idealFor: EPC contractors requiring specialist engineering input
Utilities requiring design review and verification
electrical-engineering.headline: Electrical engineering support that integrates with your project.
electrical-engineering.intro: Bodatec provides qualified electrical engineers who can be deployed into project teams or work independently to produce and review engineering documentation, perform technical studies, and support equipment specification and FAT/SAT activities.
whyBodatec: Experienced in both design office and site environments
Familiar with IEC, CENELEC, and Belgian electrical standards
Comfortable working within PMC / EPC project frameworks
Produce clear, reviewable documentation
Available for short or long-term assignments

testing-commissioning.title: Testing & Commissioning
testing-commissioning.shortDescription: Systematic pre-commissioning, commissioning, and site acceptance testing for electrical systems.
testing-commissioning.description: Bodatec delivers structured testing and commissioning support for electrical systems from MV/LV switchgear to complete substation and plant installations. Our teams follow rigorous test procedures, produce full documentation, and coordinate with all site stakeholders.
scope: MV / LV switchgear testing and inspection
Protection relay testing (functional and secondary injection)
Cable HV testing (AC/DC withstand, tan delta)
Earth grid and earthing system testing
deliverables: Test record sheets and commissioning dossiers
idealFor: Industrial plant new build or expansion
EPC contractors on electrical commissioning packages
testing-commissioning.headline: Structured testing and commissioning for electrical systems.
testing-commissioning.intro: Bodatec delivers commissioning and testing services for MV/LV switchgear, protection relays, transformers, cable systems, and complete substation installations — with full documentation and coordination.
whyBodatec: Experienced commissioning engineers and technicians
Rigorous test procedures and full documentation
Coordination with all site stakeholders
Available for short-notice mobilisation
Familiar with major utility and EPC commissioning standards

maintenance-troubleshooting.title: Maintenance & Troubleshooting
maintenance-troubleshooting.shortDescription: Planned maintenance support and fast-response fault investigation for operational electrical systems.
maintenance-troubleshooting.description: Bodatec supports operational plants and infrastructure owners with planned maintenance execution and reactive troubleshooting. Our technicians and engineers can mobilise quickly for fault resolution, and our structured approach ensures thorough investigation, clear findings, and practical corrective actions.
scope: Planned maintenance execution on MV/LV equipment
Fault investigation and root cause analysis
idealFor: Facilities teams needing specialist electrical support
Clients requiring rapid response on unexpected faults
maintenance-troubleshooting.headline: Reliable maintenance and fast fault resolution for electrical systems.
maintenance-troubleshooting.intro: Bodatec provides planned maintenance and reactive troubleshooting services for MV/LV equipment, protection systems, transformers, and switchgear — with structured investigation and full reporting.
whyBodatec: Fast mobilisation for reactive support
Thorough fault investigation and root cause analysis
Qualified technicians with hands-on field experience
Clear reporting and corrective action recommendations
Available for planned shutdowns and emergency response

hv-mv-support.title: HV / MV Support
hv-mv-support.shortDescription: Specialist high-voltage and medium-voltage technical support for substations, cable systems, and grid assets.
hv-mv-support.description: Bodatec provides specialist high-voltage and medium-voltage support across the full asset lifecycle — from design review to on-site testing, commissioning, and ongoing maintenance. Our HV-qualified personnel operate safely and competently on live and de-energised HV systems.
scope: HV cable jointing and termination supervision
HV cable testing: XLPE, paper-insulated systems
Busbar differential and distance protection testing
Transformer protection, OLTC, and differential relay testing
HV energisation support and hold-point inspections
idealFor: Renewable energy developers with grid connection works
hv-mv-support.headline: Specialist HV/MV support for substations and grid infrastructure.
hv-mv-support.intro: Bodatec provides HV-qualified engineers and technicians for substation commissioning, HV cable testing, protection relay testing, and energisation support across transmission and distribution networks.
whyBodatec: HV-authorised and competent personnel
Experience across 11kV to 132kV systems
Full test equipment for HV/MV testing
Familiar with Belgian and European HV standards
Available for energisation support at short notice

industrial-electrical-works.title: Industrial Electrical Works
industrial-electrical-works.shortDescription: Site electrical installation, cabling, and low-voltage works for industrial facilities.
industrial-electrical-works.description: Bodatec supports industrial clients with practical site electrical works — from cabling and containment installation to LV panel assembly and electrical systems integration. We coordinate with construction, process, and instrumentation teams to deliver clean, safe, and compliant installations.
scope: Cable installation and termination (LV, control, instrumentation)
Cable tray, ladder, and containment installation
MCC and switchboard installation and connection
idealFor: Industrial plant contractors requiring electrical subcontractors
Petrochemical, food processing, pharmaceutical, and manufacturing facilities
industrial-electrical-works.headline: Practical electrical installation for industrial environments.
industrial-electrical-works.intro: Bodatec delivers site electrical works including cabling, containment, panel installation, motor connections, and LV systems integration for industrial plants and facilities.
whyBodatec: Experienced in industrial site environments
Clean, safe, and compliant installations
Coordination with multi-discipline site teams
Full test and inspection documentation
Available for shutdown and turnaround windows

technical-specialist-support.title: Technical Specialist Support
technical-specialist-support.shortDescription: Flexible deployment of qualified electrical engineers and technicians to supplement project or operational teams.
technical-specialist-support.description: When projects need specific expertise or additional capacity, Bodatec provides qualified technical personnel on a flexible basis. From individual specialists to small site teams, we can supplement client or contractor workforces with engineers and technicians who can integrate quickly and deliver from day one.
scope: Site electrical engineer or supervisor supply
HV authorised person (AP) and competent person (CP) provision
idealFor: EPC contractors with peak demand on specialist roles
Projects with specific HV or protection expertise gaps
technical-specialist-support.headline: Qualified technical personnel, deployed flexibly.
technical-specialist-support.intro: Bodatec provides engineers and technicians on a flexible basis — from individual specialists to site teams — to supplement your project or operational workforce with qualified electrical expertise.
whyBodatec: Qualified engineers and technicians available at short notice
Seamless integration with client and contractor teams
Flexible engagement: project-based, time-based, or on-call
Full competency documentation provided
Both permanent and contract arrangements possible

services.pageTitle: Specialist electrical services across the full project lifecycle.
services.pageSubtitle: From early engineering support to commissioning, maintenance, and on-site technical manpower — Bodatec covers the key electrical disciplines required by industrial, utility, and energy clients.
services.sixPrimaryAreasSubtitle: Each service area is supported by qualified engineers and technicians with direct field experience.
services.howWeWorkP1: Bodatec engages with clients in the way that best fits their project structure. We can operate as a specialist subcontractor, as a supplier of technical personnel, or as an independent engineering support partner.
services.howWeWorkP2: In all cases, we begin with a clear scope definition. We agree on what will be delivered, by whom, to what standard, and by when. This removes ambiguity and allows proper planning on both sides.
services.howWeWorkP3: Our deliverables are always documented — test reports, commissioning dossiers, calculation reports, or activity records — depending on the nature of the work.
services.step01Desc: We agree precisely what will be delivered and under what conditions.
services.step02Desc: We deploy the right engineers or technicians with the correct qualifications and tools.
services.step03Desc: Work is performed to agreed standards with real-time coordination and communication.
services.step04Desc: Complete records are produced and handed over at the close of each scope.
services.furtherSupportSubtitle: Beyond our core disciplines, Bodatec can assist with the following.
services.shutdownSupportDesc: Planned shutdown execution, brownfield modification support, and outage-scope electrical works for operational plants.
services.fatSatDesc: Factory Acceptance Test and Site Acceptance Test support, including preparation of test plans, witnessing, and reporting.
services.earthingLightningDesc: Earth grid design review, soil resistivity testing, earthing resistance measurement, and lightning protection system inspection.
services.powerQualityDesc: Basic power quality assessments, load studies, and coordination studies to support plant operations or capital project decisions.
services.ctaTitle: Unsure which service fits your requirement?
services.ctaSubtitle: Contact us and describe your situation. We will tell you directly how we can help and what a typical engagement looks like.
services.ctaServiceSubtitle: Contact Bodatec for a direct conversation. We will give you an honest assessment and a clear proposal.
defaultWhyBodatec: Qualified engineers with hands-on field experience

home.heroTitle: Practical electrical engineering for industry and energy.
home.heroSubtitle: Bodatec supports industrial and energy clients with reliable electrical engineering, testing, commissioning, maintenance, and HV/MV services — delivered by qualified engineers and technicians based in Belgium.
home.aboutSubtitle: Bodatec is a Belgian electrical engineering and technical services company. We work with industrial clients, utilities, EPC contractors, and energy developers across Belgium and Europe.
home.aboutBody: Our team combines qualified engineers and experienced field technicians who understand both the technical demands and the operational realities of complex electrical projects. We integrate cleanly with client and contractor teams, execute on site to a high standard, and produce proper documentation.
home.coreServiceSubtitle: Specialist technical services across the full electrical project and asset lifecycle.
home.whyBodatecTitle: What makes Bodatec a reliable technical partner
home.whyBodatecSubtitle: Clients work with Bodatec because we combine engineering knowledge with practical field experience — and because we deliver what we commit to.
home.strengthTechnicalDesc: Our team brings hands-on experience across HV/MV systems, protection engineering, commissioning, and industrial electrical works.
home.strengthSiteDesc: We operate in live environments, complex industrial facilities, and active substations — safely and efficiently.
home.strengthReliableDesc: Bodatec delivers on agreed scope and timelines. We produce proper documentation and communicate clearly throughout.
home.strengthFlexibleDesc: From a single specialist to a full site team, we scale our deployment to fit your project requirements.
home.strengthBelgianDesc: Based in Lokeren, Belgium, with the ability to mobilise quickly across the country and into neighbouring European markets.
home.strengthPracticalDesc: We focus on what needs to happen on site — not theory. Our people understand both the engineering and the execution.
home.industriesSubtitle: We operate across a range of industrial and energy sectors, adapting our approach to each operating environment.
home.typicalScenariosSubtitle: These are the kinds of situations where Bodatec steps in and adds immediate value.
home.scenario1Desc: An EPC contractor needs commissioning engineers for protection relay testing on a new 33/11kV substation. Bodatec deploys a qualified two-person team with full test equipment.
home.scenario2Desc: A chemical plant requires annual maintenance on its MV switchgear during a planned shutdown window. Bodatec coordinates and executes the full scope within the outage schedule.
home.scenario3Desc: A utility needs HV cable testing and condition assessment on a legacy underground cable circuit. Bodatec provides qualified personnel and the necessary test equipment.
home.scenario4Desc: A design office is under-resourced on a renewable energy project. Bodatec provides a resident electrical engineer to support documentation, calculations, and vendor review.
home.careersTitle: Work with technically serious people on real projects.
home.careersSubtitle: Bodatec is building a team of qualified engineers and technicians who want to work on challenging electrical systems in Belgium and beyond.
home.offer1: Varied technical work on real industrial and energy projects
home.offer2: Direct involvement from day one — no layers of bureaucracy
home.offer3: Technically focused environment with qualified colleagues
home.offer4: Belgian base with potential for European project work
home.offer5: Opportunities for both permanent and contract arrangements
home.ctaSubtitle: Tell us about your electrical engineering or technical support requirement. We will give you a straight answer on how Bodatec can help.

about.label: About us
about.heroTitle: Engineering competence rooted in Belgian industry.
about.heroSubtitle: Bodatec is a Belgian electrical engineering and technical services company. We provide qualified engineers and technicians to industrial, utility, and energy clients who need reliable, practical support on electrical systems.
about.whoWeAreP1: Bodatec was established to fill a clear gap in the Belgian market: a technically capable, professionally operated contractor that specialises in electrical engineering and technical services for industrial and energy clients.
about.whoWeAreP2: Our work spans the full project lifecycle — from early-stage engineering support and equipment specifications, through commissioning and site testing, to ongoing maintenance and fault investigation on operational assets.
about.whoWeAreP3: We are not a general contractor. Electrical engineering is our sole focus, and that focus allows us to maintain a high standard of technical quality across everything we do.
about.whoWeAreP4: Bodatec operates in Belgium as an independent company, with connections to a broader group of technical companies operating in the energy and industrial space. This allows us to draw on wider resources and expertise where projects require it.
about.approachQuote: We believe the best technical support comes from engineers and technicians who understand both the engineering principles and the practical realities of site work. Bodatec is built around people who have that combination.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide how Bodatec works with clients and executes projects.
about.valueTechnicalDesc: We apply proper engineering standards and safe working practices on every project, regardless of scale.
about.valueClearDesc: We define what we will do and we do it. Clients can rely on Bodatec to deliver on agreed scope and schedule.
about.valueQualifiedDesc: Our engineers and technicians hold relevant qualifications and operate within certified competency frameworks.
about.valueLocalDesc: Bodatec is established in Belgium and supports clients across Belgian and broader European markets.
about.trustSubtitle: Clients choose Bodatec because we are straightforward to work with and technically dependable.
about.trust1: HV-qualified engineers capable of working on live and de-energised systems
about.trust2: Structured commissioning and testing processes with full documentation
about.trust3: Clear scope definition before work begins — no open-ended commitments
about.trust4: Direct communication with the people actually doing the work
about.trust5: Flexible engagement models: project-based, time-based, or on-call support
about.trust6: Understanding of Belgian regulatory and safety frameworks
about.ctaTitle: Want to know more about how Bodatec can support your project?
about.ctaSubtitle: Contact us for a direct conversation about your requirements.

industries.label: Industries
industries.heroTitle: Electrical expertise across industrial, energy, and utility sectors.
industries.heroSubtitle: Bodatec works across a range of sectors where reliable electrical engineering and technical execution is critical. Each sector has its own operating context — we adapt our approach accordingly.
industries.sectorsSubtitle: We tailor our support to the specific technical and operational requirements of each sector.

utilities-grid.title: Utilities & Grid Infrastructure
utilities-grid.description: Bodatec supports transmission and distribution network operators with commissioning, testing, and maintenance across HV substations and grid infrastructure assets.

industrial-plants.title: Industrial Plants & Manufacturing
industrial-plants.description: From greenfield build to brownfield modification and shutdown support, Bodatec delivers electrical installation, testing, and specialist engineering across all industrial sectors.

renewable-energy.title: Renewable Energy
renewable-energy.description: Bodatec supports renewable energy developers with grid connection works, substation commissioning, and on-site electrical testing for wind, solar, and storage projects.

substations.title: Substations
substations.description: Substations are a core area for Bodatec. We support clients across the full lifecycle — from design input and FAT witnessing through to commissioning, testing, and long-term maintenance.

offshore-wind.title: Offshore Wind & Marine Energy
offshore-wind.description: Bodatec has experience supporting offshore wind electrical systems — from onshore substation works to export cable systems and transition piece electrical scope.

critical-infrastructure.title: Critical & Commercial Infrastructure
critical-infrastructure.description: Bodatec supports data centres, hospitals, transport hubs, and other critical facilities requiring reliable, compliant electrical installations and ongoing specialist support.

industries.clientTypesSubtitle: Bodatec engages directly with the following types of clients and organisations.
industries.clientUtilitiesDesc: Support for grid infrastructure testing, commissioning, and maintenance programmes.
industries.clientEPCDesc: Specialist electrical subcontract and manpower supply for capital projects.
industries.clientIndustrialDesc: Electrical installation, maintenance, and shutdown support for operational facilities.
industries.clientOEMDesc: Field application engineering and commissioning support for equipment deployments.
industries.clientRenewableDesc: Grid connection, substation commissioning, and O&M electrical support.
industries.clientFacilitiesDesc: Specialist electrical support for critical buildings and commercial infrastructure.
industries.geoSubtitle: Bodatec is established and registered in Belgium. The majority of our work is in Belgium, but we can and do support projects across neighbouring European markets.
industries.geoP1: Belgium has a well-developed industrial base, an active energy transition programme, and significant grid infrastructure investment underway. Bodatec is positioned to support projects across all of these areas.
industries.geoP2: For larger programmes or specific client requirements, we can mobilise personnel to project sites in neighbouring countries including the Netherlands, Luxembourg, France, and Germany.
industries.keySector1: Transmission grid works — Elia network projects
industries.keySector2: Distribution network upgrades and asset management
industries.keySector4: Industrial expansion in Antwerp port and logistics zones
industries.keySector5: Renewable energy and energy storage projects
industries.keySector6: Petrochemical and chemical industry electrical works
industries.keySector7: Data centre and critical facility electrical works
industries.ctaTitle: Does Bodatec operate in your sector?
industries.ctaSubtitle: Contact us and describe your project. If we can support it, we will tell you how. If we cannot, we will say that too.

careers.label: Careers
careers.heroTitle: Join a technically serious electrical engineering team.
careers.heroSubtitle: Bodatec is building a team of qualified engineers and technicians who want to work on real electrical systems — not templates or frameworks. If you have hands-on experience and high standards, we want to hear from you.
careers.whyBodatecTitle: What working at Bodatec means in practice.
careers.whyBodatecSubtitle: We aim to be an employer where technically capable people can do interesting work, develop their skills, and be treated as professionals.
careers.cultureRealDesc: You will work on substations, industrial plants, and live electrical systems — not simulations or desk studies.
careers.cultureColleaguesDesc: The team you join at Bodatec will challenge you technically. We expect rigour and we model it ourselves.
careers.cultureDirectDesc: Bodatec is not a large corporation with layers of management. You will be involved, your input will matter, and you will see the results of your work.
careers.cultureBelgianDesc: The majority of our work is in Belgium, with the option to work on international assignments for those who want that.
careers.cultureFlexibleDesc: We work with both permanent employees and qualified freelance contractors depending on project needs.
careers.cultureDevelopmentDesc: We invest in people who want to develop. Whether that is HV authorisation, protection engineering, or project leadership — there is a path.
careers.rolesSubtitle: We recruit across a range of electrical engineering and technical disciplines.
careers.jobTechniciansDesc: Experienced electrical technicians for site installation, maintenance, and testing work across MV/LV systems.
careers.jobCommissioningDesc: Engineers with hands-on commissioning experience on electrical systems, switchgear, protection, and control.
careers.jobHVDesc: HV-authorised personnel with safe systems of work competency on high-voltage systems and substations.
careers.jobSupervisorsDesc: Experienced site electrical supervisors capable of coordinating installation and commissioning teams.
careers.jobEngineersDesc: Engineering professionals capable of producing or reviewing electrical design documentation and studies.
careers.jobFreelanceDesc: Specialist technical experts available on a contract or freelance basis for defined project scopes.
careers.expectationsTitle: What Bodatec expects from its team.
careers.expectationsP1: Bodatec operates in environments where errors matter. We work on energised systems, in industrial plants, and in substations. We expect every person on our team to take that seriously — technically and behaviourally.
careers.expectationsP2: We expect people to be reliable. That means arriving prepared, communicating clearly, and completing what was agreed. It means knowing your limits and saying so when something is outside your competency.
careers.expectationsP3: We are practical. We do not expect perfection — we expect honesty, effort, and a focus on getting the right outcome for the project and the client.
careers.expect1: Relevant technical qualifications for your discipline
careers.expect3: Ability to produce or review technical documentation
careers.expect4: Safety-aware mindset — especially for HV and industrial environments
careers.expect5: Clear communication in English and/or Dutch/French
careers.applyBody: We do not always have open positions listed — but we are always interested in speaking to qualified people. If you have relevant experience in electrical engineering, commissioning, HV systems, or industrial electrical works, send us your CV and a short note on what you are looking for.
careers.applyStep2: Include a brief note on your background and what you are looking for
careers.applyStep3: We will review and respond within five working days
careers.applyStep4: Initial conversation is non-committal on both sides
careers.ctaTitle: Ready to apply or find out more?
careers.ctaSubtitle: Send us your CV or contact us to start a conversation. No pressure, no commitment.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heroSubtitle: Tell us what you need and we will give you a direct, honest answer on how we can help. No lengthy procurement processes — just a straightforward conversation.
contact.sendMessageSubtitle: Fill in the form and a member of the Bodatec team will respond promptly.
contact.responseTimeSub: For urgent site support, call directly
contact.urgentBody: For time-critical situations — unexpected faults, urgent commissioning, or reactive maintenance — call directly rather than using the form.

contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Describe your project or requirement briefly...
contactForm.successBody: Thank you for reaching out. A member of our team will be in touch within one business day.
contactForm.responseNote: We aim to respond within one business day. Fields marked
contactForm.errorEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

cookies.title: This website uses cookies
cookies.body: We use cookies to ensure the proper functioning of our website and, with your consent, for analytics purposes. We respect your privacy and comply with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Read our
cookies.necessaryDesc: Required for the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled. They include session management and cookie consent preferences.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use our website by collecting anonymous usage data. This helps us improve our content and user experience.
cookies.marketingDesc: Used to deliver relevant content and advertisements. We currently do not use marketing cookies, but this option is provided for transparency.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
